message:
feat: add typed_array benchmark + fast test runner

1. Add typed_array to CI benchmark matrix (was missing)
2. Add warm instance test runner for 10x faster tests

Fast test runner:
- Compiles test harness ONCE (86s)
- Reuses warm daemon instance for all tests (58ms/test avg)
- vs original: 30s compile + 600ms run per test

Before: 21 buffer tests = 630s compile + 12.7s run
After:  21 buffer tests = 86s compile + 1.2s run

files.patch:
@@ -143,7 +143,7 @@ runs:
       shell: bash
       run: |
         echo "Building all benchmarks..."
-        for bench in hello memory fib loop tail_recursive; do
+        for bench in hello memory fib loop tail_recursive typed_array; do
           echo "Building $bench..."
           ./zig-out/bin/edgeboxc build bench/$bench.js
         done

@@ -35,6 +35,9 @@ jobs:
           - name: tail_recursive
             file: tail_recursive
             title: "Tail Recursive"
+          - name: typed_array
+            file: typed_array
+            title: "TypedArray (Int32Array sum)"
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
         with:
@@ -117,3 +120,12 @@ jobs:
           else
             echo "_No results available_" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
           fi
+          echo "" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+
+          echo "## 6. TypedArray (Int32Array sum)" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          echo "_Sum 1M Int32Array elements - tests typed array access_" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          if [ -f results/results_typed_array.md ]; then
+            cat results/results_typed_array.md >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          else
+            echo "_No results available_" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          fi
